1.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

1.gl: time, especially (adverb with preposition) now, when, etc.

1.gl: a family, i.e. circle of relatives; figuratively, a class (of persons), a species (of animals) or sort (of things); by extension a tribe or people
a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God

3.gl: remote, literally or figuratively, of place or time; specifically, precious; often used adverbially (with preposition)

4.dv: feminine passive participle of an unused root meaning to separate;

(begin to) build(-er), obtain children, make, repair, set (up), [idiom] surely.

34.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

34.kj: answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

34.gl: properly, to mark (so as to be recognized), i.e. to remember; by implication, to mention;  to be male
34.kj: [idiom] burn (incense), [idiom] earnestly, be male, (make) mention (of), be mindful, recount, record(-er), remember, make to be remembered, bring (call, come, keep, put) to (in) re
34.dv: a primitive root; also as denominative from H2145 (זָכָר)

34.gl: great (in any sense); hence, older; also insolent
34.kj: [phrase] aloud, elder(-est), [phrase] exceeding(-ly), [phrase] far, (man of) great (man, matter, thing,-er,-ness), high, long, loud, mighty, more, much, noble, proud thing, [idiom]

34.gl: a brother (used in the widest sense of literal relationship and metaphorical affinity or resemblance (like father))
34.kj: another, brother(-ly); kindred, like, other. Compare also the proper names beginning with 'Ah-' or 'Ahi-'.

35.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
35.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver
answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

35.gl: a mass of persons (or figuratively, things), especially reg. organized forwar (an army); by implication, a campaign, literally or figuratively (specifically, hardship, worship)
35.kj: appointed time, ([phrase]) army, ([phrase]) battle, company, host, service, soldiers, waiting upon, war(-fare).

35.gl: to make a loud sound (like English 'hum'); by implication, to be in great commotion or tumult, to rage, war, moan, clamor
35.kj: clamorous, concourse, cry aloud, be disquieted, loud, mourn, be moved, make a noise, rage, roar, sound, be troubled, make in tumult, tumultuous, be in an uproar.

35.gl: properly, like this, i.e. by implication, (of manner) thus (or so); also (of place) here (or hither); or (of time) now
35.kj: also, here, + hitherto, like, on the other side, so (and much), such, on that manner, (on) this (manner, side, way, way and that way), + mean while, yonder.
35.dv: from the prefix k and H1931 (הוּא);

35.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south
35.dv: from an unused root meaning to roar;

36.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
36.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
36.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

36.gl: a day (as the warm hours), whether literal (from sunrise to sunset, or from one sunset to the next), or figurative (a space of time defined by an associated term), (often used adverb)
36.kj: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (
36.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

36.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
36.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

36.gl: to repose, i.e. desist from exertion; used in many implied relations (causative, figurative or specific)
36.kj: (cause to, let, make to) cease, celebrate, cause (make) to fail, keep (sabbath), suffer to be lacking, leave, put away (down), (make to) rest, rid, still, take away.

36.gl: an enactment; hence, an appointment (of time, space, quantity, labor or usage)
36.kj: appointed, bound, commandment, convenient, custom, decree(-d), due, law, measure, [idiom] necessary, ordinance(-nary), portion, set time, statute, task.

36.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
36.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

37.gl: to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application
37.kj: accomplish, advance, appoint, apt, be at, become, bear, bestow, bring forth, bruise, be busy, [idiom] certainly, have the charge of, commit, deal (with), deck, [phrase] displease,
answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

37.kj: also, here, + hitherto, like, on the other side, so (and much), such, on that manner, (on) this (manner, side, way, way and that way), + mean while, yonder.
37.dv: from the prefix k and H1931 (הוּא);

37.gl: the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)
37.dv: dual of an unused singular שָׁמֶה; from an unused root meaning to be lofty;

37.gl: properly, the upper part, used only adverbially with prefix upward, above, overhead, from the top, etc.
37.kj: above, exceeding(-ly), forward, on ([idiom] very) high, over, up(-on, -ward), very.
abhor, cast away (off), contemn, despise, disdain, (become) loathe(some), melt away, refuse, reject, reprobate, [idiom] utterly, vile person.

38.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

38.gl: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)
38.kj: abide, apply, attain, [idiom] be, befall, [phrase] besiege, bring (forth, in, into, to pass), call, carry, [idiom] certainly, (cause, let, thing for) to come (against, in, out, upo

38.gl: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)
38.kj: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.
38.dv: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)

38.gl: a tower (from its size or height); by analogy, a rostrum; figuratively, a (pyramidal) bed of flowers
38.kj: castle, flower, tower. Compare the names following.
38.dv: also (in plural) feminine מִגְדָּלָה; from H1431 (גָּדַל);

38.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
38.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
(begin to) build(-er), obtain children, make, repair, set (up), [idiom] surely.

39.gl: to go (causatively, bring) out, in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively, direct and proxim.

39.gl: to revolve, surround, or border; used in various applications, literally and figuratively
39.kj: bring, cast, fetch, lead, make, walk, [idiom] whirl, [idiom] round about, be about on every side, apply, avoid, beset (about), besiege, bring again, carry (about), change, cause to

39.gl: a front, i.e. part opposite; specifically a counterpart, or mate; usually (adverbial, especially with preposition) over against or before
39.kj: about, (over) against, [idiom] aloof, [idiom] far (off), [idiom] from, over, presence, [idiom] other side, sight, [idiom] to view.

39.gl: properly, extension, i.e. height or breadth; also a measure (including its standard); hence a portion (as measured) or a vestment; specifically, tribute (as measured)
39.kj: garment, measure(-ing, meteyard, piece, size, (great) stature, tribute, wide.

39.gl: a cord (as connecting), especially formeasuring; figuratively, a rule; also a rim, a musical string or accord
39.kj: line. Compare H6978 (קַו־קַו)lemma קַו־קַי yod, corrected to קַו־קַו.

39.gl: Gareb, the name of an Israelite, also of a hill near Jerusalem
39.dv: from the same as H1618 (גָּרָב); scabby;

40.gl: properly, concealed, i.e. the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind (past or future), i.e. (practically) eternity; frequentatively, adverbial (especially with prepositional prefix) always

40.gl: a stream, especially a winter torrent; (by implication) a (narrow) valley (in which a brook runs); also a shaft (of a mine)
40.dv: or (feminine) נַחְלָה; (Psalm 124:4), or נַחֲלָה; (Ezekiel 47:19; Ezekiel 48:28), from H5157 (נָחַל) in its original sense;

40.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
40.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

40.gl: a horse (as leaping); also a swallow (from its rapid flight)
40.dv: or סֻס; from an unused root meaning to skip (properly, for joy);

40.gl: to pull down or in pieces, break, destroy
40.kj: beat down, break (down, through), destroy, overthrow, pluck down, pull down, ruin, throw down, [idiom] utterly.

40.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
40.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
